use_codes.desc: A THERAPEUTIC METHOD FOR CONTROLLING THROMBOSIS
METHOD FOR CONTROLLING THROMBOSIS AND DECREASING BLOOD HYPERCOAGULATION AND HEMORRHAGING RISKS

METHOD FOR THE PREVENTION AND/OR TREATMENT OF THROMBOTIC EPISODES, SUCH AS MYOCARDIAL INFARCTION, IN A HUMAN PATIENT AND METHOD FOR THE PREVENTION OF VENOUS THROMBOSIS IN A POSTOPERATIVE HUMAN PATIENT
